title: carex × grossii
intro: Carex × grossii, also known as the broad-leaved sedge, is a hybrid plant species within the Carex genus, typically found in woodland habitats across Europe and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex × grossii include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Carex × grossii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also employed in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
